title: Anna University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Assistant Posts
description: Anna University has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for B.E./ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech, and M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the Anna University Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
